items.q: What are the check-in and check-out times?
items.a: Check-in from 14:00, check-out before 12:00. Early check-in and late check-out available on request.
Yes, we offer free parking for all hotel guests.
Free cancellation up to 48 hours before arrival. After that, a 1-night fee applies per our cancellation policy.
Free breakfast buffet is served from 6:30–10:30 at the 1st floor restaurant.

booking.title: Book a Room
booking.subtitle: Complete your information to book at AuroraHotel
booking.missingGuestInfo: Please complete the guest name and email before continuing.
booking.specialRequestsPlaceholder: High floor, nice view, baby crib...
booking.successDesc: We have received your booking request. A confirmation email will be sent within a few minutes.
booking.successQueueNotice: The system is processing your request. Your booking code will be sent to your email shortly.
booking.noRoom: No room selected. Please choose a room before booking.
booking.loginRequired: You need to log in to continue booking.
booking.loginHint: The system will use your current account to create the booking.
booking.guestBookingTitle: You can book without signing in
booking.guestBookingHint: Signing in only helps prefill your guest information. You can still continue as a guest if you prefer.
booking.roomNotFound: No matching room was found for this booking.
booking.invalidDateRange: Check-out date must be after check-in date.
booking.invalidPhone: The phone number is invalid or exceeds the allowed length.
booking.invalidPaymentMethod: Please complete the selected payment method information before continuing.
booking.exceedCapacity: The number of guests exceeds the room capacity.
booking.bookingFailed: Unable to create the booking right now. Please try again.
booking.paymentHint: Choose how you want to pay before finishing your booking.

bank_transfer.label: Bank transfer
bank_transfer.description: Transfer in advance for faster reservation hold

credit_card.label: Credit / debit card
credit_card.description: Pay with Visa, Mastercard, or JCB

pay_at_hotel.label: Pay at hotel
pay_at_hotel.description: Reserve now and pay when you check in

booking.bankTransferNote: Please include your booking code in the transfer note after the booking is created.
booking.payAtHotelNote: You will pay directly at the front desk during check-in. The reservation will still follow the hotel holding policy.
booking.confirmationHint: Review your stay and payment details before completing the reservation.
booking.bankTransferSummary: You selected bank transfer. Transfer instructions will be shown after the booking is created.
booking.payAtHotelSummary: You selected to pay at the hotel during check-in.
booking.finalNotice: After completion, the system will create the booking and keep your selected payment information for front desk processing.
booking.roomUnavailableForDates: This room is not available for the selected dates. Please choose different dates.
